<h1>Source code for booktx.epub_io</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;EPUB extraction and rebuild adapters over epub2text and text2epub.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">inspect</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">zipfile</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">dataclasses</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">dataclass</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">field</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.chunking</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ProseSpan</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_manifest</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">assert_source_sha</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">build_raw_block_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">structured_to_navigation_refs</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">structured_to_span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">structured_to_text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;EpubExtraction&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;build_epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;extract_epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;read_epub&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="EpubExtraction">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_io.EpubExtraction">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EpubExtraction</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Structured EPUB extraction data used by booktx.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">navigation</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="read_epub">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_io.read_epub">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">read_epub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">zipfile</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ZipFile</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Open an EPUB archive for direct ZIP-level inspection.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">zipfile</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ZipFile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<span class="n">_CHAPTER_CONTRACT_CACHE</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_epub2text_annotates_blocks</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return True when the installed epub2text maps navigation onto blocks.</span>

<span class="sd">    booktx EPUB chapter detection consumes ``TextBlock.chapter_id`` /</span>
<span class="sd">    ``chapter_title`` populated by ``annotate_blocks_with_navigation`` during</span>
<span class="sd">    ``extract_structured()``. Tagged releases that predate that wiring (for</span>
<span class="sd">    example v0.2.6, which has no ``toc_map`` module and never calls the</span>
<span class="sd">    annotator) must be rejected before booktx writes any new-format manifest.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.parser</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">as</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">_parser</span>
        <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.toc_map</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">as</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">_toc_map</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ImportError</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">callable</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_toc_map</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;annotate_blocks_with_navigation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">inspect</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">getsource</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_parser</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="ne">OSError</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="ne">TypeError</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="c1"># Source unavailable (e.g. a zipped install). The ``toc_map`` module</span>
        <span class="c1"># existing at all is a strong signal here because pre-annotation</span>
        <span class="c1"># releases do not ship it; full behavioral coverage is the deferred</span>
        <span class="c1"># released-epub2text contract test.</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;annotate_blocks_with_navigation&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_assert_epub2text_chapter_contract</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Fail EPUB extraction early if epub2text lacks the block annotator.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">global</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_CONTRACT_CACHE</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_CONTRACT_CACHE</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_CHAPTER_CONTRACT_CACHE</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_epub2text_annotates_blocks</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">_CHAPTER_CONTRACT_CACHE</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">RuntimeError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Installed epub2text does not annotate extracted blocks with &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;navigation chapter metadata: annotate_blocks_with_navigation is &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;missing or is not wired into extract_structured(). booktx EPUB &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;chapter detection requires an epub2text release that maps &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;navigation onto TextBlock.chapter_id/chapter_title during &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;structured extraction. Upgrade epub2text and re-run &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;`booktx extract`.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="extract_epub">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_io.extract_epub">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">extract_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">EpubExtraction</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Extract translatable EPUB spans through epub2text structured blocks.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_assert_epub2text_chapter_contract</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">extract_epub_structure</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">epub2text.structured</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ExtractionPolicy</span>

    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">structured</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extract_epub_structure</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_raw_documents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_offsets</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_inline_runs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_segments</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">include_xhtml_fragments</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ExtractionPolicy</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">normalize_whitespace</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">remove_duplicate_titles</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">include_nav_documents</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">strict_offsets</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">TypeError</span> <span class="k">as</span> <span class="n">exc</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">RuntimeError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Installed epub2text does not support include_xhtml_fragments; &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;upgrade epub2text before extracting EPUB sources.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span> <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">exc</span>
    <span class="n">raw_block_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_raw_block_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">structured_to_span_refs</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">[],</span>
        <span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">EpubExtraction</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">spans</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">structured_to_text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">raw_block_index</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">raw_block_index</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">navigation</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">structured_to_navigation_refs</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">structured</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="build_epub">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.epub_io.build_epub">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">source_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">extraction</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubExtraction</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">span_replacements</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Rebuild an EPUB via text2epub using one replacement per extracted span.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``span_replacements`` provides one target string per entry in</span>
<span class="sd">    ``extraction.spans`` (sentence-level). Spans are grouped back into one</span>
<span class="sd">    :class:`text2epub.Replacement` per block-level ``span_ref``: for each</span>
<span class="sd">    ``span_ref`` the replacements whose span index falls in</span>
<span class="sd">    ``[span_ref.span_index, next_span_index)`` are joined with a space. When</span>
<span class="sd">    every span of a block is unchanged, the original raw block is reused so</span>
<span class="sd">    pass-through builds stay byte-identical even when the joined sentence XHTML</span>
<span class="sd">    differs from the stored block fragment.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">text2epub</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[import-not-found]</span>
        <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_replacements</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;EPUB rebuild replacements must provide one entry per extracted span.&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">assert_source_sha</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_inline_xhtml</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">sanitize_target_fragment</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.placeholders</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">restore</span>

    <span class="n">source_fragments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">restore</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">replacements</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">next_span_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_span_index</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">next_span_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">targets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_replacements</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">sources</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_fragments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">joined_target</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">t</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">targets</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">t</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">t</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="n">joined_source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sources</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">s</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="n">source_view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_view_text</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span>
        <span class="n">replacement_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">joined_target</span>
        <span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
        <span class="n">records_unchanged</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">all</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">target</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">source</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">zip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">targets</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">sources</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">strict</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">records_unchanged</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">replacement_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">joined_target</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">source_view</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">replacement_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_markup</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-inline-xhtml:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">sanitized</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sanitize_target_fragment</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">joined_target</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">joined_source</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">errors</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">issue</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">issue</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">sanitized</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">issues</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">issue</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">severity</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">errors</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">replacement_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">sanitized</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">xhtml</span>
            <span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
        <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Replacement</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">block_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">replacement_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">expected_source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">allow_inline_xhtml</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">rebuild_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">ReplacementPlan</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_epub</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">extraction_manifest</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">replacements</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">replacements</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
